title: PublicHeadersUnchangedInput
description: Input structure for the public_headers_unchanged predicate.

header_glob.description: Glob pattern identifying public header files.

before_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot before the task.

after_snapshot_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the workspace snapshot after the task.

workspace_root.description: Absolute path to the workspace root used to resolve the glob.
